title: Paracaryopsis lambertiana
taxonomy: Paracaryopsis lambertiana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae. It is a member of the order Sapindales and the class Magnoliopsida. The genus Paracaryopsis is part of the family Burseraceae and is closely related to the genus Cinnamomum. Further classification places it as a member of the kingdom Plantae and the domain Eukarya. This classification provides a comprehensive understanding of the plant's relationships and evolutionary history.
